subject: Two glowing energy orbs with star motifs, representing Double Turbo Energy, a special trainer energy card
description: Two large translucent orbs or spheres, each containing a multi-pointed star emblem, float against a bright glowing background. The orbs have a luminous, crystalline quality with white and pale blue highlights. The energy radiating from the orbs gives the card an electric and powerful feel. The overall composition is symmetrical, with both orbs of equal prominence, reinforcing the 'double' concept of the card.
foreground: two glowing crystalline orbs with star emblems
